Package com.longport.market

Class ConstituentStock

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.longport.market.ConstituentStock
  • public class ConstituentStock
extends Object
    One constituent stock of a market index.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      BigDecimal amount
      Trading volume (shares).
      BigDecimal balance
      Turnover amount.
      BigDecimal chg
      Day change percentage.
      BigDecimal circulatingShares
      Circulating shares.
      boolean delay
      Whether this is a delayed quote.
      BigDecimal inflow
      Net capital inflow today.
      String intro
      Brief description.
      BigDecimal lastDone
      Latest price.
      String market
      Market, e.g.
      String name
      Security name.
      BigDecimal prevClose
      Previous close.
      String symbol
      Security symbol.
      String[] tags
      Tags, e.g.
      BigDecimal totalShares
      Total shares outstanding.
      int tradeStatus
      Raw trade status code.
